scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:proc-backend" "npm run start:pc-backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:proc-frontend" "npm run start:pc-frontend" "npm run start:wms-frontend"
scripts.start:proc-backend: cd "採購審查流程系統/backend" && node index.js
scripts.start:pc-backend: cd "零用金申請系統/backend" && node server.js
scripts.start:proc-frontend: cd "採購審查流程系統/frontend" && npm run dev -- --host
scripts.start:pc-frontend: cd "零用金申請系統/frontend" && npm run dev -- --host
scripts.start:wms-frontend: cd "印度採購管理系統" && npm run dev -- --host
